name: Epic Quest - Definitive Edition
short_description: Epic Quest is a singleplayer game stylized after classic 8-bit JRPG games of the 1980s. You are tasked with defeating the dreadful Disciple of Antisex. Explore a mysterious world, recruit mercenaries into your party, and fight terrible monsters!
detailed_description:
Epic Quest - Definitive Edition is the remake of 2024's Epic Quest, updating the game to a new engine and improving pretty much every single aspect of the original.

You take on the role of Adam, the descendant of the legendary hero Darius, who once liberated the world from the dreaded Lord Antisex' rule. Many years have passed, and the threat has returned! Your mission is to defeat the Disciple of Antisex, who seeks to enslave the whole land. Through his power many fearsome creatures began to surface, terrorizing the people.

You have a large world to explore, full of many interesting places, a ton of items and non-playable characters whose advice you may be needing to progress in the game, while also learning of the world you're in. You'll be fighting a variety of monsters, differing from place to place, varying from slimes, chickens and bats, to living sets of armor, wizards and dragons. You'll also be able to recruit mercenaries that will be necessary to progress.

Try not to get lost in gradually more complex dungeons and explore them thoroughly, so you won't miss anything that may help. At the very end, engage in battle against the terrifying Disciple of Lord Antisex and ensure he will share his even more terrible master's fate! And who knows... maybe you'll even be able to stop one more threat before it can restore it's power?

The Definitive Edition Includes:

Improved 8-bit graphics!

An original 2A03 soundtrack!

Classic JRPG gameplay!

Completely reworked dungeons!

New and redrawn enemies!

From 5 to 8 hours of adventure!

A terrifying final boss!

A completely rewritten script!

Extra endgame dungeons!
